    @allure.title("GET /api/v1/dictionary/district/?region=1 - unauthorized returns 401")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_get_district_list_unauthorized(self):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that request without token returns 401 Unauthorized
        """
        with allure.step("Send GET request without auth token"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/dictionary/district/"
            response = requests.get(url, params={"region": REGION_ID})
    
        with allure.step("Verify status code is 401"):

            )
